text:
She was the mother of Kurapika and a member of the Kurta Clan. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 1 

Appearance

Kurapika's mother donned a crimson-colored Kurta garb with light pink swirling over a cream-colored undershirt. Her cropped leggings are cream-colored, with a swirling crimson pattern. In the manga, she donned another outfit unseen in her animated appearance with colors unknown. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 2 She had short blonde hair, darker than Kurapika's, and grey eyes.

Personality

Kurapika's father stated that Kurapika inherited his mother's personality, which he seems to be unaware of. She wished for her son to go to the outside world and challenge the clan's fearful thoughts about it. She was an adventurous, optimistic, and plucky woman, who, in Kurapika's childish worldview when he was young, was perceived as being "noisy". Her last words to Kurapika were a warning against being too short-tempered. 

Background

She was first seen having a talk with her husband, about Kurapika taking the tests. 

Later, she, along with her husband and other Kurta clan members, was massacred and had their Scarlet Eyes stolen by the infamous group, the Phantom Troupe.
